commands.summary: The end-to-end governance loop test drives request -> persisted risk -> evidence -> decision (authority grant) -> outcome -> audit (four chained entry types, verified) -> replay (ordered steps + final state) -> agent status, then tampers a decided record and asserts verification fails.

commands.command: node --test backend-dist/channels.test.js backend-dist/telnyx.test.js backend-dist/database.test.js backend-dist/migration.test.js backend-dist/server.test.js backend-dist/signals.test.js backend-dist/twilio.test.js
commands.summary: Full backend suite of 101 tests passed.

environment.process_note: AGH-027: one integration test proves the full governance lifecycle holds together (request -> risk -> evidence -> decision -> outcome -> audit -> replay) beyond per-primitive unit tests.
